description: Marketing site gap implementation — design handoff v11 parity

stories.title: LinkedIn URL fix in SiteFooter
acceptanceCriteria: Footer LinkedIn href points to linkedin.com/company/asklilyhealth
Link opens in new tab
No broken social links in SiteFooter

stories.title: Add 5 new icons to Icon component (arrow-left, arrow-right, x, building, phone)
acceptanceCriteria: Icon component supports: arrow-left, arrow-right, x, building, phone
Icons render correctly at all standard sizes
TypeScript types updated for new icon names

stories.title: MobileAppShowcase component — 3 phone-frame mockups
acceptanceCriteria: MobileAppShowcase renders 3 phone-frame cards
Each frame contains app screen mockup content
Responsive layout works on mobile and desktop
Component ported from design reference 07-mobile.jsx

stories.title: ProductTour component — 14-tile slideshow with keyboard nav
acceptanceCriteria: ProductTour renders 14 feature tiles in a slideshow layout
Keyboard navigation (arrow keys) advances/retreats slides
Active tile highlighted, progress indicator visible
Component ported from design reference 08-tour.jsx

stories.title: Wire ProductTour + MobileAppShowcase into homepage
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage index.astro imports and renders ProductTour
Homepage index.astro imports and renders MobileAppShowcase
Sections appear in correct visual order
No hydration errors in browser console

stories.title: Fix ProductTour reveal opacity (remove .reveal class dependency)
acceptanceCriteria: ProductTour tiles visible without requiring .reveal CSS class
Tiles do not flash invisible on mount
Opacity defaults to 1 when .reveal class is absent

stories.title: Orbit animation fix — photo stays static, badge ring animates
acceptanceCriteria: Center photo/avatar in Orbit component does not rotate or animate
Badge ring orbits around the static center photo
Animation is smooth with no jank
Hover state triggers pill expansion on badges only
